module.name: radar
module.description: A radar (spider) chart: axes around a circle, one or two data series as polygons. Lines "Label: value" or "Label: v1, v2" for two series.
module.aiSpec:
A RADAR / SPIDER chart for comparing multi-axis profiles (skills, product scores). Block module: one axis per line (sections are merged): `Speed: 8` one series, `Speed: 8, 6` two series (same order on every line). 3–8 axes work best. Do NOT use this for time series or single-metric data. Parameters: `max` (number, default auto) — axis maximum; blank = the largest value in the data. `series` (text, default "") — legend names, comma-separated (e.g. "Ours, Theirs"). `color` / `color2` (colors) — series 1 and series 2 colors. `grid` (boolean, default true) — show the concentric rings and spokes. `levels` (number 1-8, default 4) — number of concentric rings. `showvalues` (boolean, default false) — print each value at its vertex. `size` (number px 120-800, default 360) — max chart width. `fill` (number % 0-100, default 25) — series polygon fill opacity.
<!-- @radar max: 10, series: "Ours, Theirs", showvalues: true --> Speed: 8, 6 Cost: 5, 9 Quality: 9, 7 Support: 7, 4 <!-- @end -->

param.name: max
param.label: Axis max (auto)
param.desc: Axis maximum; blank = auto (largest value in the data).

param.name: series
param.label: Series names
param.desc: Legend names, comma-separated, e.g. Ours, Theirs.

param.name: color
param.label: Series 1 color
param.desc: Color of the first data series.

param.name: color2
param.label: Series 2 color
param.desc: Color of the second data series (if present).

param.name: grid
param.label: Show grid
param.desc: Show the concentric rings and axis spokes.

param.name: showvalues
param.label: Show values
param.desc: Print each value at its vertex.

snippet.label: Radar chart
snippet.text: <!-- @radar max: 10, series: "Ours, Theirs" --> Speed: 8, 6 Cost: 5, 9 Quality: 9, 7 Support: 7, 4 Docs: 6, 8 <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Spider chart; "Label: value" (or "v1, v2" for two series) per line.
